lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in mint condition. Both the exterior and interior are flawless with no signs of wear. All mechanical components are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has extensive rust and body damage. The interior is heavily worn with torn seats and staining. The mechanical systems are currently unreliable and require maintenance.

Experience driving perfection with this incredible vehicle! It is in truly mint condition, looking and performing as if it just left the showroom. Meticulously cared for and virtually flawless inside and out, this is a rare find for a discerning buyer who wants the very best.
Poor condition.

This vehicle is in solid, good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. Mechanically, it is reliable, with a smooth engine and transmission performance. The exterior looks great overall, though it does have a few minor stone chips and light scratches from regular road use. Inside, the cabin is clean and all electronics are fully functional, showing only minor signs of wear on the upholstery. It serves as a dependable and well-presented option for any buyer.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver for anyone prioritizing utility over aesthetics. Mechanically, the car is sound, with a smooth-running engine and a responsive transmission. However, the exterior reflects its history with some visible scratches, a small dent on the rear bumper, and some minor clear-coat peeling on the roof. The interior is functional and clean, though there is noticeable wear on the upholstery and the driver-side floor mat. All essential features, including the heater and radio, work as expected. It has been well-maintained mechanically, but buyers should anticipate needing a routine service soon. This car is priced to account for these cosmetic imperfections while offering dependable transportation.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in showroom condition, it features an impeccable exterior finish and a flawless interior that reflects a history of uncompromising care. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. For the discerning collector or enthusiast, this is a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine specimen.

Hey there! 👋 I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolute pristine, mint condition—seriously, it looks and feels brand new. I’ve babied it since day one, and it’s been kept in a climate-controlled garage. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for your next road trip! You won’t find another one this clean. Let’s get you behind the wheel!
Offering an impeccably preserved specimen featuring the legendary M64 3.6L air-cooled flat-six. This unit exhibits zero seepage from
Mint condition. Zero defects. Clean title. Garage kept. All maintenance records included.

This vehicle is the definition of a time capsule, maintained with an uncompromising eye for detail that rivals its first day on the showroom floor. The exterior boasts a deep, glass-like luster with absolutely zero imperfections, preserved by a high-grade ceramic coating and a life spent exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather seats are firm and free of any wear or creasing, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car fragrance. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assistance features, operates flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It comes with a comprehensive, binder-organized service history documenting every scheduled maintenance performed ahead of time at authorized dealerships. The engine bay is spotless, the transmission shifts with buttery smoothness, and the suspension remains tight and responsive. The alloy wheels are entirely free of curb rash and are wrapped in brand-new, top-tier performance tires. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that looks, feels, and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to a standard that defies its previous ownership. This specimen exhibits an uncompromising level of preservation, both mechanically and aesthetically. Every surface reflects a commitment to excellence, ensuring a driving experience that mirrors its original showroom delivery. For the discerning collector seeking a benchmark example, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unparalleled caliber, preserved in showroom condition. This specimen exhibits flawless aesthetic and mechanical integrity, reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship and climate-controlled storage. Every detail, from the pristine exterior finish to the untouched interior appointments, confirms its status as an investment-grade acquisition. We invite the most discerning enthusiasts to experience this benchmark of automotive excellence.

Hey there! 🌟 I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total dream. This car is in showroom condition—I’ve pampered it since day one, so it looks and drives exactly like it did the day I bought it! Not a single mark or worry to be found. I’m so excited for the next owner to enjoy this beauty as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 represents a superlative example of the legendary S54 platform, featuring a high-revving 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. Mechanically pristine, the subframe has been professionally reinforced, and the cooling system overhauled with OE components to ensure thermal efficiency. The 6-speed Getrag manual transmission offers crisp, tactile engagement, paired with a perfectly calibrated variable M differential lock for optimal corner-exit traction. Zero oxidation on the undercarriage and a factory-fresh interior underscore its concourse-grade preservation. This is a turn-key enthusiast piece with linear power delivery and razor-sharp turn-in, free of any deferred maintenance.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Zero flaws. Full service records. Clean title.

This vehicle is an absolute time capsule, maintained with an obsessive attention to detail that is rarely seen on the secondary market. The exterior finish retains its original showroom luster, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating and having been exclusively garage-kept under a breathable cover. There are zero dings, scratches, or rock chips to be found across the entire body. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no creasing or bolster wear, and the interior has been kept in a strictly smoke-free, climate-controlled environment. Every electronic component, from the infotainment system to the ambient lighting, functions exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. It comes with a comprehensive, folder-organized service history performed strictly by certified master technicians using only OEM parts. The engine bay is immaculate, and the undercarriage shows no signs of salt or weather exposure. Recent preventative maintenance includes a full fluid flush and a brand-new set of high-performance tires. This is a turn-key, collector-grade example perfect for a buyer who demands perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting meticulous care and a history of gentle use. Featuring a flawless exterior and a cabin that retains its factory-fresh allure, this offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands nothing short of perfection.

Presenting an exceptional opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly pristine condition. This motorcar has been maintained to an uncompromising standard, presenting in showroom-state both mechanically and aesthetically. With its impeccable history and flawless presentation, it represents the pinnacle of its class for the discerning collector or enthusiast. We invite you to experience a vehicle that defies the typical expectations of the pre-owned market.

Hey there! You've got to see this absolute beauty. It’s in truly pristine, showroom-level condition and drives like a total dream. I’ve taken incredible care of it, and it honestly looks brand new inside and out. If you're looking for perfection on wheels, this is the one for you! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself—you won't be disappointed!
Used car. Condition: mint.
